title: aurinia leucadea subsp. scopulorum
intro: Aurinia leucadea subsp. scopulorum, also known as Scopolia scopulorum, is a plant species that belongs to the family Campanulaceae, commonly referred to as the bellflower family. It is a perennial plant that contains alkaloids, including scopolamine and hyoscyamine, which possess medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Aurinia leucadea subsp. scopulorum include its ability to act as an anticholinergic agent, reducing spasms and alleviating pain. The health benefits of this plant include its use in treating conditions such as muscle spasms, inflammation, and respiratory issues, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
